app.name: Sincerely
app.one_sentence_promise: Helps you notice and say the specific, real thing you appreciate about someone — and actually get it to them.
app.target_user: Emotionally intentional adults who want to strengthen relationships with family, friends, or mentors but lack a designed way to express it beyond generic texts.
app.painful_moment: Thinking 'I should tell them how much that meant to me' and never doing it because there's no specific format, or it feels shallow over text.
app.why_different: Solo-first structured gratitude journal that composes a specific-appreciation note and delivers it via native Share Sheet — the recipient needs zero app to receive it.
app.why_users_pay: Premium card designs/typography, relationship reminders ('you haven't told X anything in 6 months'), a private permanent archive/export.
app.subscription_model: Free: basic card style, manual sending, 5 saved relationships. Paid: unlimited premium designs, relationship reminders, archive/export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Fully local journal and relationship reminders; sending via native Share Sheet rendering a shareable card, no server needed.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Optional cloud sync of the archive across devices; eventual two-way 'received' tracking if the recipient also has the app.
core_workflows: Write a specific-appreciation note with guided prompts
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: Optional on-device LLM writing assist to turn a rough thought into a well-worded specific note — opt-in, never auto-generating fake sentiment.
app.design_direction: Warm, tactile, fine-stationery aesthetic — letterpress textures and typography, not a social-app look.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a fine-stationery-inspired gratitude app: a calm relationship list, a guided note composer that feels like writing a real card, and an elegant preview/send screen — no gamification, no feed.
app.app_store_positioning: Say the specific thing. Sincerely helps you write and send real appreciation — not another generic 'thinking of you' text.
key_risks: Writing-assist overuse could feel like a greeting-card gimmick
Specific-compliment prompts could feel like homework
Premium card designs must not read as cosmetics-only monetization
app.invalidation_criteria: If users send once and never return within 6 weeks with no engagement from relationship reminders, redesign the reminder mechanic before assuming the concept fails.
app.v1_build_scope: Relationship list, guided note composer, Share Sheet sending, one reminder type.
